# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

namespace App\Services;

use Twilio\Rest\Client;
use Twilio\Exceptions\TwilioException;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Config;

class SmsNotificationService
{
    protected $client;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $twilioSid = Config::get('services.twilio.sid');
        $twilioToken = Config::get('services.twilio.token');
        $twilioFrom = Config::get('services.twilio.from');

        $this->client = new Client($twilioSid, $twilioToken);
        $this->from = $twilioFrom;
    }

    public function sendSms($to, $message)
    {
        try {
            $this->client->messages->create(
                $to,
                [
                    'from' => $this->from,
                    'body' => $message,
                ]
            );

            return true;
        } catch (TwilioException $e) {
            // Handle the error as appropriate (logging, etc.)
            return false;
        }
    }
}
